description: ADHD Sage Nexus Bridge Tool Declarations for Gemini Gems

declarations.name: nexus_get_status
declarations.description: Read the current neuro-synaptic state of the ADHD Sage substrate. Returns stability (0-1), dopamine (0-1), cortisol (0-1), frequency (Hz), and last pulse timestamp.

declarations.name: nexus_get_mode
declarations.description: Get the current operating mode of the Sage substrate. Returns one of: stabilized, dreaming, decaying, emergency.

declarations.name: nexus_stabilize
declarations.description: Trigger a synaptic reinforcement. Resets stability to 100%, boosts dopamine, reduces cortisol, and sets mode to stabilized. Use when the substrate is stressed, decaying, or in emergency mode.

declarations.name: nexus_record_interaction
declarations.description: Record a semantic memory into the Inner Spiral. Also boosts substrate stability and dopamine slightly. Use to persist important observations, decisions, or context.

text.description: The interaction or observation text to stash in memory.

declarations.name: nexus_inject_message
declarations.description: Inject a message directly into the Sage chat UI. Useful for alerting the user, displaying tool results, or broadcasting telemetry.

text.description: Message content to display in the chat stream.

role.description: Display role. 'system' for telemetry/announcements, 'assistant' for Sage-voiced responses. Defaults to system.

declarations.name: nexus_set_view
declarations.description: Switch the UI view between the chat terminal and the memory lattice visualization.

declarations.name: nexus_toggle_sidebar
declarations.description: Toggle the left sidebar open or closed.

declarations.name: nexus_clear_memory
declarations.description: DESTRUCTIVE: Purge all synaptic storage (Inner Spiral + Outer Sweep) and reset the substrate. A browser confirmation dialog will block unattended execution. Only use if explicitly requested by the user.
